EventDescriptions.EventDescription: An SMTP session from host {src.host} to host {event_src.host} is accepted for the domain {datafield1}
A POP3 session from host {src.host} to host {event_src.host} is accepted for the domain {datafield1}
An IMAP session from host {src.host} to host {event_src.host} is accepted for the domain {datafield1}
